Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class ListViewEventStream

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.ListViewEventStream
public class ListViewEventStream extends SObject

Java class for ListViewEventStream complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ListViewEventStream">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AppName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ColumnHeaders" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeveloperName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EvaluationTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventSource" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventUuid" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExecutionIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FilterCriteria" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}json" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ListViewId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LoginHistory" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}LoginHistory" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LoginHistoryId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LoginKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumberOfColumns" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OrderBy" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OwnerId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Policy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}TransactionSecurityPolicy" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PolicyId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PolicyOutcome" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="QueriedEntities" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Records" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}json" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RelatedEventIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReplayId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RowsProcessed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Scope" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Sequence" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SessionKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SessionLevel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SourceIp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="User" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Username" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
